'''tathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pigmentationally|pigmentationally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-th-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pigmentationally|pigmentationally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tathate|tathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tathatesher|tathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tathatesherĂ«m|tathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tathatero|tathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tathateshĂ«|tathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tathateshĂ«m|tathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitathatero|gokitathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitathateshĂ«|gokitathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitathateshĂ«m|gokitathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotathankerom|gotathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotathankeshĂ«|gotathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotathankeshĂ«m|gotathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotathankeya|gotathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tathaterom|tathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tathatemu|tathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tathateya|tathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitathaterom|gokitathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitathatemu|gokitathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitathateya|gokitathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tathathate|tathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tathathatesher|tathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tathathatesherĂ«m|tathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tathathatero|tathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tathathateshĂ«|tathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tathathateshĂ«m|tathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitathathatero|gokitathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitathathateshĂ«|gokitathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitathathateshĂ«m|gokitathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotathathankerom|gotathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotathathankeshĂ«|gotathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotathathankeshĂ«m|gotathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotathathankeya|gotathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tathathaterom|tathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tathathatemu|tathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tathathateya|tathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitathathaterom|gokitathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitathathatemu|gokitathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitathathateya|gokitathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠthĂŠte|tĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠthĂŠtesher|tĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠthĂŠtero|tĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠthĂŠtero|gokitĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠthĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠthĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠthĂŠterom|tĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠthĂŠtemu|tĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠthĂŠteya|tĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠthĂŠterom|gokitĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠthĂŠteya|gokitĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafthafte|tafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafthaftesher|tafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafthaftesherĂ«m|tafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafthaftero|tafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafthafteshĂ«|tafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafthafteshĂ«m|tafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafthaftero|gokitafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafthafteshĂ«|gokitafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafthafteshĂ«m|gokitafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafthafnkerom|gotafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafthafnkeshĂ«|gotafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafthafnkeshĂ«m|gotafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafthafnkeya|gotafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafthafterom|tafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafthaftemu|tafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafthafteya|tafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafthafterom|gokitafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafthaftemu|gokitafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafthafteya|gokitafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
